acceptedAnswer.text: SOHUB Connect is a borderless, cloud-native PBX system built for Bangladeshi businesses. It replaces traditional phone numbers with click-to-call buttons and QR-based calling.

mainEntity.name: How does Click to Connect work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Customers click a button on your website or app, and instantly connect via voice call. No dialing, no phone numbers needed. Works on websites, web apps, landing pages, and any online platform.

HotScan is QR-based calling for offline marketing. Print QR codes on brochures, packaging, billboards, or delivery slips. Customers scan with their smartphone camera and connect instantly via voice call.
Yes! FREE FOREVER plan includes up to 5 users/phones, Click to Connect buttons, HotScan QR calls, team-based call handling, call history & analytics, and email support.

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost after 5 users?

acceptedAnswer.text: 50 BDT per additional user per month. 1 Button = 1 User, 1 HotScan = 1 User.

mainEntity.name: Do customers need to download an app?

acceptedAnswer.text: No! Customers use their smartphone's built-in browser. No app downloads required for Click to Connect or HotScan.
Smart IVR/call flow, ring groups, custom audio recordings, team management, call analytics, dashboard, operator panel, and more. All accessible from any web browser.

mainEntity.name: Is it suitable for e-commerce businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! Perfect for SOHO and e-commerce businesses in Bangladesh. Replace personal mobile numbers with professional calling solutions that work across cities and countries.
